quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: Chinese Proverb

quotes.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
quotes.author: George Addair

quotes.text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
quotes.author: Tim Notke

quotes.text: Winning isn't everything, but wanting to win is.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi

quotes.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.text: Champions keep playing until they get it right.
quotes.author: Billie Jean King

quotes.text: The more I practice, the luckier I get.
quotes.author: Gary Player

quotes.text: It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi

quotes.text: Pain is temporary. Quitting lasts forever.
quotes.author: Lance Armstrong

quotes.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
quotes.author: John D. Rockefeller

quotes.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.text: There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
quotes.author: Colin Powell

quotes.text: If you really want to do something, you'll find a way. If you don't, you'll find an excuse.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
quotes.author: Vidal Sassoon

quotes.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life. The only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Entrepreneurship is neither a science nor an art. It is a practice.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: It's not about ideas. It's about making ideas happen.
quotes.author: Scott Belsky

quotes.text: The critical ingredient is getting off your butt and doing something.
quotes.author: Nolan Bushnell

quotes.text: Never give up! Failure and rejection are only the first step to succeeding.
quotes.author: Jim Valvano

quotes.text: You have to expect things of yourself before you can do them.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: Talent wins games, but teamwork and intelligence win championships.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: The strength of the team is each individual member. The strength of each member is the team.
quotes.author: Phil Jackson

quotes.text: Gold medals aren't really made of gold. They're made of sweat, determination, and a hard-to-find alloy called guts.
quotes.author: Dan Gable

quotes.text: The highest compliment that you can pay me is to say that I work hard every day.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.text: What makes something special is not just what you have to gain, but what you feel there is to lose.
quotes.author: Andre Agassi

quotes.text: Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
quotes.author: John Wooden

quotes.text: Be more concerned with your character than with your reputation.
quotes.author: John Wooden

quotes.text: The most important thing is to try and inspire people so that they can be great in whatever they want to do.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: Everything negative - pressure, challenges - is all an opportunity for me to rise.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: I can accept failure, everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: Some people want it to happen, some wish it would happen, others make it happen.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.text: If you're afraid to fail, then you're probably going to fail.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: The moment you give up is the moment you let someone else win.
quotes.author: Kobe Bryant

quotes.text: Dream as if you'll live forever, live as if you'll die today.
quotes.author: James Dean

quotes.text: The best revenge is massive success.
quotes.author: Frank Sinatra

quotes.text: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
quotes.author: George Eliot

quotes.text: Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: What we think, we become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.text: Get busy living or get busy dying.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.text: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: Don't count the days, make the days count.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: If you can dream it, you can do it.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.
quotes.author: Will Rogers

quotes.text: You learn more from failure than from success.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
quotes.author: Charles Kingsleigh

quotes.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Success doesn't just find you. You have to go out and get it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Dream bigger. Do bigger.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Little things make big days.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: It's going to be hard, but hard does not mean impossible.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Don't wait for opportunity. Create it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Sometimes we're tested not to show our weaknesses, but to discover our strengths.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Dream it. Believe it. Build it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Your limitation—it's only your imagination.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Work hard in silence. Let success make the noise.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Success is not for the lazy.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: If you fell down yesterday, stand up today.
quotes.author: H.G. Wells

quotes.text: Never bend your head. Always hold it high. Look the world straight in the eye.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Believe in yourself! Have faith in your abilities! Without a humble but reasonable confidence in your own powers you cannot be successful or happy.
quotes.author: Norman Vincent Peale

quotes.text: If you want to achieve greatness stop asking for permission.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: To live a creative life, we must lose our fear of being wrong.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Good things come to people who wait, but better things come to those who go out and get them.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: If you do what you always did, you will get what you always got.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.text: Don't wish it were easier. Wish you were better.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
quotes.author: Bruce Feirstein

quotes.text: All progress takes place outside the comfort zone.
quotes.author: Michael John Bobak

quotes.text: Through perseverance many people win success out of what seemed destined to be certain failure.
quotes.author: Benjamin Disraeli

quotes.text: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
quotes.author: Beverly Sills

quotes.text: The only thing standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself.
quotes.author: Jordan Belfort

quotes.text: I never lose. I either win or learn.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
quotes.author: Roy T. Bennett

quotes.text: It's not the load that breaks you down, it's the way you carry it.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.text: The man who has confidence in himself gains the confidence of others.
quotes.author: Hasidic Proverb

quotes.text: Tough times never last, but tough people do.
quotes.author: Robert H. Schuller

quotes.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: Darkness cannot drive out darkness: only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate: only love can do that.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.text: Without music, life would be a mistake.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: We accept the love we think we deserve.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.text: There are no two words in the English language more harmful than 'good job'.
quotes.author: Whiplash

quotes.text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison
